solution: 
```class Solution {
public:
    int hammingWeight(int n) {
        return __builtin_popcount(n);
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution leverages the built-in function __builtin_popcount, which efficiently counts the number of set bits in constant time. This approach is optimal for performance and energy efficiency.
